sourceTitle: Mad Kitchen FOH SOPs (Bar / Barista / Floor on duty)

modules.title: Bar On Duty — SOP
modules.desc: Standard operating procedure for the bar / counter station on duty.

steps.heading: Rules
items: Greet customers at all times unless you are serving someone at the counter.
Keep bench & ice cream freezer clear — remove dirty dishes immediately.
Keep ice cream freezer sliding doors clear at all times.

steps.heading: 1. Counter service
items: Greet customers with a smile.
Ask customers: dine-in / takeaway / phone order / online order.
Phone order: needs to pay at counter.
Online order: already paid.
Dine-in: when floor staff is busy, seat them and provide menu and water, then assign them to floor staff.
Dine-in order at counter: record name as “Dine in”.
Takeaway: always take names — record as “TA Cassie / TA Cassie with food / TA Cassie with toasties”.
Phone order: always take names — record as “PU Imogen / PU Imogen with food / PU Imogen with benji roll”.

steps.heading: 3. Completed order handover
items: Hand over drinks / food / combined.
Uber & DoorDash: confirm driver app name and order details.

steps.heading: 4. Ready orders & heat lamp
items: Put ready orders under the heat lamp.
Heat lamp OFF for: poke bowl / açai / pancake / French toast.
Make cold drinks while balancing the counter and waiting / to-be-seated customers.

steps.heading: Prioritise orders
items: 1. Takeaway, no food
2. Dine in
3. Takeaway with food
4. Pick up orders
5. Uber / DoorDash

steps.heading: Group orders
items: Check dine in / takeaway.
Batch the same drinks together.
E.g. 3 iced latte base / 2 berry madness / 4 chocolate milkshake.

steps.heading: When drinks are under control (fewer than 2–3 fresh orders)
items: Remove dirty dishes on the bench immediately.
Help running food and drinks.
Help floor staff.
Sort out Uber / DoorDash orders.
Load dirty dishes onto a tray and take them to the dishwasher before returning to fresh orders.
Polish and put away clean dishes before returning to fresh orders.
Bring dirty dishes to the kitchen.
Wash cutlery if the kitchen is busy.
Empty juicer basket, milk crate and bins.
Make retail coffee bags.
Help barista ONLY when busy: pull shots, top up coffee beans, top up milk, top up takeaway cups & lids, empty knock tube.

modules.title: Barista On Duty — SOP
modules.desc: Standard operating procedure for the barista station on duty.

steps.heading: Rule
items: Your job is not just making coffee.
Greet customers while you are making coffee or doing other tasks.
Clean your station as you go.

steps.heading: 1. Coffee orders
items: Prioritise coffee orders by food-prep time and order type: 1. Takeaway no food, 2. Dine in, 3. Takeaway with food, 4. Pick ups, 5. Uber & DoorDash.
Takeaway — make immediately for all rolls (Benji Roll, Hash Brown Roll, Egg & Bacon Roll).
Delay slightly or ask the kitchen for: Croissants (5 min), Toasties (6–8 min), Bagels (6–8 min), Burgers (6–8 min), Wings (10–15 min), Breakfast (15 min).

steps.heading: 2. Call out orders
items: Clearly call out when orders are ready for handing out or pickup (drinks only, or combined drinks and food).

steps.heading: 3. When coffee orders are under control (fewer than 2–3 fresh orders)
items: Restock the coffee station for the next rush.
Rinse all cloths & the group handle.
Serve counter customers.
Assign tables and provide menus and water to waiting / to-be-seated customers.
Help running food and drinks.
Sort out Uber and DoorDash orders.
Make or assist with cold drinks to free up bar staff.
Put away dirty dishes on the bench.
Load dirty dishes onto a tray and take them to the dishwasher before returning to fresh coffee orders.
Polish and put away clean dishes before returning to fresh coffee orders.
Bring dirty dishes to the kitchen.
Wash cutlery if the kitchen is busy.
Empty bins, milk crates, knock tube.
Make retail coffee bags.

steps.heading: Before break
items: Restock the coffee station.
Restock any milk if running very low.
Empty bins, milk crates, and knock tube.

modules.title: Floor On Duty — SOP
modules.desc: Standard operating procedure for the floor station on duty.

steps.heading: Rules
items: Full floor scan at all times (who is waiting, who has ordered, who needs attention, who has waited too long for food/drinks).
Check table layout at all times (ensure orders are correctly put through).
Your floor must be 100% under control before helping any other station.

steps.heading: 1. Queue management
items: Manage the full queue first — do not serve customers individually out of sequence.
Greet with a smile.
Identify dine-in / takeaway / phone orders / Uber or DoorDash.
Takeaway / phone / Uber / DoorDash: direct customers to the counter.
Dine-in: seat all dine-in customers first; menus and water come second. E.g. if there are 3 groups, seat all three groups first.

steps.heading: 2. Taking orders (do not forget to put orders through)
items: Repeat the order with eye contact and enter it immediately.
Check dietary requirements with the kitchen or manager if unsure.
Set up cutlery.

steps.heading: 4. Run food & drinks
items: Run food and drinks promptly.
Clear tables as soon as customers finish — do not wait for them to leave.

steps.heading: 5. Water service
items: All dining tables must have water.
Replace water bottles when they are running low.

steps.heading: 6. Customer departure
items: Thank customers when they leave and ask: “How was everything today?”
Report all feedback, suggestions, complaints, compliments and special occasions (birthday, newborn, etc).

steps.heading: When the floor is under control
items: Support bar / barista — take orders or make drinks.
When the floor needs support again (new customers / run food & drinks / cleaning): finish the current task, inform bar/barista staff, then return to floor immediately.
Maintain full floor scan (every 1–2 min): check all tables — finished plates, empty glasses, water level, customer signals.
Reset and prepare tables — always keep them “ready to sit”.
Stock check & refill (do not wait till empty): napkins / cutlery / water / water cups / dog water; top up banana bread / cookies / takeaway menus / loyalty cards.
Polish and put away clean dishes & cutlery.
Sort out Uber and DoorDash orders.
Put ready orders under the heat lamp (heat lamp OFF for poke bowl / açai / pancake / French toast).
